subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Through the boundless grace of the Lord God thou art firm in service and eloquent in praise of His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از فضل بی پایان حضرت یزدان قائم بخدمتی و ناطق بثنای حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
